data.description:
## Context
A new `authorship` attestation kind (namespace `rebar.authorship.v1`) that signs the event's DSSE-PAE bytes via the foundation's substrate and verifies offline against the identity's in-band keys.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Authorship signing/verifying goes through the foundation `attest` substrate with namespace `rebar.authorship.v1`.
- [ ] Test: an event signed by identity A does not verify against identity B's keys; a tampered event fails.
- [ ] Trust root is the identity's in-band public keys (resolved from the identity entity).
data.title: identity: authorship attestation kind on the foundation substrate
